text:
Cost Composite Tier (pre-IR) Cost Composite Tier indicator before Informal Review process: low, average, or high. Average Cost Composite Tier is applied to practices with Cost Composite Scores that are more than 1 standard deviation from the peer group mean but not statistically significantly different from the peer group mean. 30 Num 8 1=Low, 2=Average, 3=High, .=Practice did not meet minimum 2016 PQRS reporting requirements
QUAL_COMP_TIER_POST_IR Quality Composite Tier (post-IR) Quality
